meanings.definition: the meaning of a word or expression; the way in which a word or expression or situation can be interpreted
examples: the dictionary gave several senses for the word
in the best sense charity is really a duty
the signifier is linked to the signified
An example sentence would show what this word means
These words mean nothing to me!
What does his strange behavior signify?

meanings.definition: make known with a word or signal
examples: He signified his wish to pay the bill for our meal
